name: overtli-task-manager
description: Codex-first task management with route checklists, chat progress, current.json state, checkpoint memory, hooks, skills, and stop audits.

interface.shortDescription: Route checklists and checkpoint memory for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Keep Codex organized with evidence-backed route segments, chat-visible progress, project-specific context cache, lifecycle hooks, and stop-audit enforcement.
defaultPrompt: Use Overtli Task Manager to plan, execute, validate, summarize, and clear this task.
Install Overtli Task Manager in this repository.
